verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Acquire records prior state; Conflicts handled; Audited; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.prior_evidence: acquire probes and records the real pre-acquire host state ({port, free:true} asserted equal in both the return value and the first audit line).
gate_result.conflict_evidence: A second acquire of a held resource is rejected with a conflict error and an acquire-denied audit entry (reason already-held); a failing acquire auto-releases and audits, leaving zero holds.
gate_result.audit_evidence: Every path — grant, denial, auto-release — lands in the append-only log.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: Real double-acquire and real failing GPU-node acquire executed.
gate_result.red_first: gates committed red with the control plane absent (8/8 files failing) at the lane red commit, green at HEAD

proof_summary: ARCHBP-103 is complete: taking authoritative control records the prior host state for restore, conflicting acquires are denied and audited, and failed acquires auto-release — nothing is ever half-held or unrecorded.
